title: SXhyf Cleaning Brush - Hard Bristle Crevice Cleaning Brush UK, Multifunctional Gap Cleaning Scrub Brush, Grout Brush, Cleaning Products for Household Use, Home, Kitchen, Bathroom, Window, Vehicle
features: Premium Material: SXhyf hard bristle crevice cleaning brush is made from high-quality plastic and stainless steel, rustproof, sturdy and long-lasting, with a long service life. The handle is made of non-slip and environmentally friendly materials, which is more comfortable to grip and use
Multifunctional Brush: SXhyf magic brush can be used to clean the gaps of various objects, and the cleaning effect is more comprehensive

Deep Cleaning: SXhyf cleaning brush are designed with a narrow head and a long handle, which can easily enter gaps and corners, making it easier to clean small spaces dust, debris, and other dirt in hard-to-reach areas. This cleaning gadgets is sturdy enough for outdoor use as well
Easy Storage: The handle of the brush is also designed with a small hole for easy hanging up to save space and drying

Wide Application: SXhyf cleaning brush is suitable for cleaning various gaps and corners, such as window tracks, tile countertop grout lines, sink handles, corners, lint from fans, shower stand, stove, fridge gaskets, furniture, bathroom tub, windowsills, closet tracks, sliding door tracks, hummingbird feeders, tight spaces, between the sink and the backsplash, etc

specifications_table.Specific Uses For Product: Bathroom, Toilet, Shower, Bathtub, Basin, Grout Lines, Tile, Floor, Pool, Vehicle, Deck, Furniture, Flower Pots, Boat, Car Seats, Kitchen, Sink, Stove, Cooker, Counter, Dish, Grill, Microwave, Coffee Maker, Shoes, Water Bottle, Waste Bin, Refrigerator Coil, Keyboards, Bicycle, etc, Window Tracks, Dryer Vent, Floor, Radiator, Door Frames, Fans
